node.text: Jolene accomplished something significant with her engineering project and came up with neat solutions that she's excited about.

node.text: Jolene had an idea for a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids.

node.text: Jolene plans to team up with local schools/centers to do workshops and invite engineers as guest speakers for the volunteer program.
